summary: Assign an organization role to a user
description:
Assigns an organization role to a member of an organization. For more information on organization roles, see "[Using organization roles](https://docs.github.com/organizations/managing-peoples-access-to-your-organization-with-roles/using-organization-roles)."

The authenticated user must be an administrator for the organization to use this endpoint.

OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `admin:org` scope to use this endpoint.

404.description: Response if the organization, user or role does not exist.

422.description: Response if the organization roles feature is not enabled enabled for the organization, the validation failed, or the user is not an organization member.
